drl:
rule "R0"
no-loop
when
    T1()
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    ( not T0(f1 == 3, f0 >= 5, f1 > -1 && f1 < 100) )
    or
    ( not T0(f1 == 3, f0 >= 5, f1 > -1 && f1 < 100) )
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -5
when
    ( $p2_0 : T0(f1 >= 100, $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0) )
    or
    ( $p2_0 : T0(f2 == -3, $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f0) )
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
salience -3
when
    accumulate( T1(f0 != 9, $s3_0 : f0); $a3_0 : max($s3_0) )
    not(T0() and T0(f1 in (-1000000007)))
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p4_0 : T0(f2 <= 4, $b4_0_0 : f2)
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p4_0.getF1(), $p4_0.getF0(), "zz"));
end
rule "R5"
salience -10
when
    $p5_0 : T0(f2 <= 100, $b5_0_0 : f2)
    T1(f2 matches "zz?", f2 not in ("ab", "ab"))
    T0($b5_2_0 : f2, $b5_2_1 : f2)
then
    delete($p5_0);
end
name: fz_360001_381
_finding: D-372 DECODED (2026-07-20; was the D-369-round stub 'un-triaged count fork'): A LIVE DROOLS DEFECT — the ACC-SOURCE REQUEUE DEAFNESS. After an accumulate's source EMPTIES, repopulating it never re-queues the rule when the accumulate sits in a SUBNET-SPLIT (non-terminal) segment: the empty<->non-empty transitions ride the link/unlink notification path, a no-op for the always-linked acc segment, so the dirty notification is swallowed (AgendaDump graft: RuleAgendaItem queued=false throughout the repopulation; lmask constant — not a linking loss). The engine fires the reborn activation at its salience-correct slot; Drools never evaluates it (engine 25 vs oracle 23 firings; final facts EQUAL). Boundary pinned by the p-grid (probes_pending/notrel/PINS.md D-372): single-segment paths notify (p1); mid-population deltas notify (p3); plain and bare-not followers don't split (p7/p8 MATCH); a DATA-INERT subnet reproduces it (p9 DIVERGE) — so structurally-equivalent LHS variants (not T2() vs not(T2() and T2(f0==5)), T2 unpopulated) FORK THE FIRING SET = the D-092/D-114 self-inconsistency signature. UPSTREAM CHECK (D-263 pattern, throwaway 10.1.0 oracle, 3x stable): the deafness is IDENTICAL in Drools 10.1.0 — live in the current line, nothing version-fixed. Engine arguably MORE correct. Disposition = Bryan's gate: wall (correct-in-engine + upstream report, the axis-2 doctrine) vs port-the-deafness (axis-1). Minimal repro for filing = p9_inert_subnet (pr_nl_381p9 shape).
